forgot-password.title: Forgot Password
forgot-password.description: Enter your email to receive a password reset link

success.title: Email Sent!
success.message: We've sent a password reset link to
success.check-email: Please check your email and click the reset link to create a new password.

success.title: Email Verified!
success.message: Your email has been successfully verified. You can now sign in to your account.

error.title: Verification Failed
error.message: The verification link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new verification email.

success.title: Password Reset!
success.message: Your password has been successfully reset. You can now sign in with your new password.

error.title: Reset Failed
error.message: The reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new password reset.

error.password-length: Password must be at least 8 characters long

toast.forgot-password-error: An error occurred while sending reset link
toast.email-verify-error: An error occurred during email verification
toast.reset-password-error: An error occurred while resetting password

registration.title: Registration Successful!
registration.email-sent: We've sent a confirmation link to
registration.check-email: Please check your email and click the confirmation link to activate your account.
